capture_card.description: Capture one memory card for the current identity and wake Panda.
capture_card.wakeMessage: The user captured a {{input.kind}} memory card titled {{input.title}} with tags {{input.tags}} and confidence {{input.confidence}}/5. Use it only if it helps future context.
capture_card.sql: insert into memory_cards (identity_id, captured_on, kind, title, details, confidence, tags_json, review_on, created_at) values (:identityId, :captured_on, :kind, :title, nullif(:details, ''), :confidence, coalesce(:tags, '[]'), coalesce(nullif(:review_on, ''), date(:now, '+14 days')), :now)

archive_card.description: Archive one memory card for the current identity.
archive_card.sql: update memory_cards set archived_at = :now where id = :id and identity_id = :identityId

snooze_review.description: Move a card's review date forward and wake Panda with a tiny note.
snooze_review.wakeMessage: The user snoozed memory card {{input.id}} for {{input.days}} days. No follow-up needed unless this changes an active plan.
snooze_review.sql: update memory_cards set review_on = date(:now, '+' || :days || ' days') where id = :id and identity_id = :identityId
